phase.description: The numeric identifier of the phase that produced this output.

summary.description: A concise summary of the phase results.

items.description: A list of findings, recommendations or deliverables generated by the phase.

id.description: A stable identifier (e.g. BUG-01, UX-02) assigned during Phase 4.

category.description: The classification of the item (e.g. bug, ux_improvement, performance, refactor, feature, documentation, todo).

description.description: A short description of the item.

severity.description: The severity of the item as determined in Phase 4.

impact.description: The potential impact of the item on users, performance or business goals.

effort.description: The estimated effort to address the item (Small, Medium, Large).

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the item, including file paths and optional line numbers or runtime notes.

files.description: Paths to files where the issue or evidence was found.

lines.description: Line numbers or ranges associated with the evidence (optional).

runtime.description: Details of any runtime behaviour that supports the finding (optional).
